title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: ansible-freeipa bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for ansible-freeipa is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian

fixes.description: [ansible-freeipa] Rebase to latest version for RHEL-9.7
[ansible-freeipa] Add support for DNS-over-TLS for ipaclient, ipareplica and ipaserver roles - RHEL-9.7
[ansbile-freeipa] Ensure ipaidrange required parameters are correct on recent versions of IPA [rhel-9]
[RFE] [ansible-freeipa] Provide playbook compatibility in Ansible freeipa/idm RPM - RHEL-9.7
[ansible-freeipa] ipaclient: client_dns has new statestore arg with IPA change e6445b8 - RHEL-9.7

full_text:
An update for ansible-freeipa is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
